report_type: Claude Code Invocation Method Audit and Fix

executive_summary.issue_found: Claude Code was invoked with -p flag (API mode, costs money)
executive_summary.issue_severity: HIGH — Every render would incur API charges
executive_summary.fix_applied: Removed -p flag, switched to interactive stdin mode (Max subscription, no cost)
executive_summary.result: Zero API cost per render job

problematic_command: ← THIS FLAG ACTIVATES API MODE (COSTS MONEY)

problem_explanation.dash_p_flag_does: Converts Claude Code to single-prompt headless mode. Uses Anthropic API, charges per token.
problem_explanation.max_subscription_alternative: Interactive session mode (no -p flag) includes Claude Code as part of subscription. Zero API cost.

context_handling_before_fix.correct_method: Write context files to cwd, read them as files in interactive session
context_handling_before_fix.what_was_happening: Context files (ep{N}_script_context.txt, ep{N}_srt_context.txt) were being written to remotion_dir correctly
context_handling_before_fix.but_the_prompt: Was being passed via -p CLI argument, forcing API mode instead of using interactive session
context_handling_before_fix.result: Context files ignored, prompt sent to API, unnecessary API charges

change_1_removed_p_flag.impact: Switches from API mode to interactive stdin mode

change_2_pass_prompt_via_stdin.before: result = subprocess.run(cmd, cwd=..., capture_output=True, text=True, timeout=2700)
change_2_pass_prompt_via_stdin.after: result = subprocess.run(cmd, cwd=..., input=prompt, capture_output=True, text=True, timeout=2700)
change_2_pass_prompt_via_stdin.mechanism: Prompt fed to Claude Code's stdin, which activates interactive session mode without -p flag

change_3_added_comment.added: # Context files already written to remotion_dir — Claude Code reads them as files
# Use interactive mode (no -p flag) to use Max subscription, not API
change_3_added_comment.purpose: Document the correct behavior for future maintainers

why_this_works: Claude Code with no -p flag enters interactive session mode
Interactive mode reads files from cwd (/home/agentuser/remotion/)
Context files (ep{N}_script_context.txt, ep{N}_srt_context.txt) are already present in cwd
Prompt provided via stdin activates the session with full file access
Max subscription covers all interactive sessions — no API calls

2_confirmed_p_flag_presence.finding: -p flag WAS present (line 299) — this was the problem

3_fix_applied_and_confirmed.what_fixed: -p flag removed, prompt now via stdin

6_zero_api_calls_in_function.api_key_references: ANTHROPIC_API_KEY appears only in old code comments/docstrings, not used

after.line_295: # Context files already written to remotion_dir — Claude Code reads them as files
after.line_296: # Use interactive mode (no -p flag) to use Max subscription, not API
after.line_303: # Provide the prompt via stdin for interactive mode

after_fix.subscription_cost: Included in Claude Code Max subscription

how_interactive_mode_works.step_2: Claude Code invoked with no -p flag in /home/agentuser/remotion/ directory
how_interactive_mode_works.step_4: Claude Code reads prompt from stdin, enters interactive session
how_interactive_mode_works.step_5: Claude Code can now read/write files in /home/agentuser/remotion/
how_interactive_mode_works.step_6: Claude Code reads context files and executes the prompt
how_interactive_mode_works.step_7: Session runs up to --max-turns 30 within 45-minute timeout
how_interactive_mode_works.step_8: All interactions covered by Claude Code Max subscription (no API calls)
how_interactive_mode_works.result: Zero cost, full interactivity, file access, version control within Claude Code

verification_checklist.no_anthropic_imports: ✅ render_pipeline.py has no 'import anthropic' or 'from anthropic import'
verification_checklist.no_api_key_usage: ✅ ANTHROPIC_API_KEY not referenced in active code
verification_checklist.p_flag_removed: ✅ -p flag not in new command array
verification_checklist.stdin_mode_enabled: ✅ input=prompt parameter passes prompt via stdin
verification_checklist.context_files_present: ✅ Context files written before Claude Code invocation (lines 243–248)

next_steps: Monitor current EP02 render (PID 2229770 started at 20:25:34 UTC)
This render is still using old code with -p flag (no cost impact, just inefficient)
Next render will use new fixed code (Max subscription, no API charges)
After EP02 completes, verify scene_sequence.json was created successfully
Document this fix in AGENTS.md or render_pipeline.py comments for future maintainers

summary.issue: Claude Code was being invoked via API (expensive) instead of interactive Max subscription (free)
summary.root_cause: -p flag in command array forced headless single-prompt API mode
summary.fix: Removed -p flag, pass prompt via stdin to activate interactive session mode
summary.code_quality: Interactive mode is more maintainable — Claude Code has full file/version control access
summary.future_proof: Max subscription covers all interactive sessions indefinitely
